decks.notes: The deck focuses on aggressive creature plays with powerful dragons like Magmatic Hellkite and Nova Hellkite, supported by cards like Burst Lightning and Clarion Conqueror to control the board while dealing damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant for additional support and Multiversal Passage for mana fixing. The overall strategy is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with flying creatures and direct damage, utilizing the synergy between dragons and burn spells for maximum efficiency.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a big swing that overwhelms the opponent. It includes a mix of cards that help with both filling the graveyard and reanimating creatures, along with some control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to set up a game-winning combo that can be difficult for the opponent to recover from, ultimately leading to victory through a powerful reanimation strategy.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo. It also includes cards like Escape Tunnel and Fecund Greenshell to help protect creatures and generate value. Additionally, the deck includes cards that benefit from having a wide board, such as Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures and use cards like Sapling Nursery and Shared Roots to maintain a steady flow of threats.

This deck focuses on utilizing graveyard recursion and powerful combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent. By manipulating the graveyard with cards like Restless Reef and Multiversal Passage, the player can quickly fill their graveyard with key combo pieces before utilizing reanimation spells like Requiting Hex to bring back powerful creatures like Harvester of Misery and Superior Spider-Man. Cards like Deceit and Deadly Cover-Up provide protection for the combo pieces, while cards like Bitter Triumph and Insatiable Avarice allow the player to generate massive advantage and finish off the opponent.

The primary theme of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure to the opponent. By utilizing efficient creatures and disruptive spells, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggression and control elements. With cards like Aang, Swift Savior and Floodpits Drowner, the deck can quickly establish a threatening board state while cards like Spell Snare and Seam Rip help disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes some versatile planeswalkers like Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Ajani, Outland Chaperone for additional threats and situational advantage.

This deck focuses on efficiently ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Aang and Appa. The key strategy is to use Aang, Swift Savior in combination with Airbender Ascension to generate a powerful board state, while also utilizing protection from cards like Badgermole Cub. The synergy between cards like Floodfarm Verge, Temple Garden, and Interdimensional Web Watch allows for consistent mana generation and board presence. Overall, the deck is centered around quickly building a formidable army and overwhelming opponents with powerful airbending abilities.

The main concept of this deck is to strategically discard powerful creatures like Harvester of Misery and Superior Spider-Man into the graveyard, then bring them back onto the battlefield using cards like Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator. This reanimation combo allows for explosive plays and overwhelming board presence. Additionally, cards like Insatiable Avarice and Bitter Triumph provide additional value by gaining advantage from discarding and reanimating creatures. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on maintaining control of the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up resources and setting up its own win condition. By efficiently managing resources and consistently answering threats, this deck seeks to outlast and outmaneuver opponents until it can establish a dominant position on the battlefield and secure a victory. With a mix of utility lands, card advantage spells, and versatile answers, this control deck is designed to adapt to a variety of situations and emerge victorious.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. By utilizing cards like Flamebraider and Ashling, Rekindled, the deck can deal damage to the opponent's creatures and life total efficiently. The deck also includes cards like Wistfulness and Stock Up to maintain card advantage and keep up the pressure. Using a combination of different types of mana sources, such as lands like Steam Vents and Breeding Pool, the deck aims to consistently cast its spells and maintain a strong presence on the battlefield.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures and using control elements to maintain board presence and pressure the opponent. The key strategy is to quickly play out creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider to deal damage and control the board with cards like Deceit and Roaming Throne. The inclusion of counterspells like Wistfulness and removal spells like Bounce Off provide additional disruption. By efficiently building a threatening board state and disrupting the opponent's plans, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through aggressive plays.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on quick aggression and disruption through a combination of powerful creatures and removal spells. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Deep-Cavern Bat and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Requiting Hex and Spell Snare. The deck aims to control the board early on and maintain pressure throughout the game, utilizing a mix of creatures and spells to keep the opponent on the back foot and secure a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, focusing on dealing direct damage to the opponent while utilizing efficient creatures and spells to control the board. The deck aims to consistently apply pressure and force the opponent to react while also having the potential to finish them off with powerful finishers like Nova Hellkite. By utilizing a mix of burn spells, efficient creatures, and powerful finishers, this deck aims to relentlessly attack the opponent and secure a victory in a fast and aggressive manner.

The foundation of this deck lies in quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, allowing for early creature plays like Earthbender Ascension and Esper Origins. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of efficient creatures like Fecund Greenshell and Icetill Explorer, supported by pump spells like Mightform Harmonizer. Escape Tunnel and Ba Sing Se provide protection for key creatures, while Shared Roots and Sapling Nursery generate additional value and card advantage. The deck aims to maintain a steady board presence and pressure opponents with a fast and aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on using a combination of graveyard recursion and powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By discarding cards and utilizing reanimation spells, the player can bring back high-impact creatures like Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery from the graveyard. Additionally, the deck includes spells like Stock Up and Insatiable Avarice to fill the graveyard with useful spells and creatures. The goal is to quickly assemble a powerful board state and outpace the opponent using a mix of control and aggression.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through card advantage, counter spells, and removal while utilizing the Izzet color combination of blue and red. It aims to maintain board control with Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental while using cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig for key pieces. By utilizing a mix of burn spells like Burst Lightning and creatures like Glacial Dragonhunt, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and eventually overwhelm them with powerful threats like Winternight Stories and Sunderflock.

This Jeskai Control deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up resources and setting up for powerful late-game plays. The deck utilizes cards like Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up to keep the hand full, while cards like Day of Judgment and No More Lies help to control the board. With a mix of reactive and proactive spells, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a battle of attrition.
